Package com.bencodez.advancedcore.api.inventory.editgui.valuetypes

Class EditGUIValue

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.advancedcore.api.inventory.editgui.valuetypes.EditGUIValue
Direct Known Subclasses:
EditGUIValueBoolean, EditGUIValueInventory, EditGUIValueList, EditGUIValueNumber, EditGUIValueString
public abstract class EditGUIValue extends Object
Abstract base class for GUI edit values.
